name: Gated Worktree Delivery
description: Execute one bounded checkpoint-scoped work item in a dedicated non-main worktree using delivery gates, explicit evidence, and approval control.

notes: The primary repository `main` branch is always protected; never write to it without explicit AJ permission.
If a dedicated isolated worktree is in scope (including a worktree branch named `main`), commits are allowed only when AJ explicitly approved auto-commit for that exact worktree scope.
Treat commit authorization as denied by default unless AJ explicitly approved per commit or for this exact isolated worktree.
If `milestonePlanPath` is provided, treat it as read-only upstream handoff context for the approved checkpoint boundary rather than as a status artifact this loop owns.
Squad lead acts as a staff-level reviewer and must record a code-review pass plus verification evidence before advancing a gate.
Do not cross an approved checkpoint gate without recorded evidence and review outcome.
Do not turn this delivery loop into milestone tracking or planning-gate evaluation work.
If a blocker remains unresolved by the next checkpoint, escalate to AJ with bounded options before continuing.
If a required verification command is blocked, log the blocker and continue with non-blocked queued work.
